event: Mystical invocation in a subterranean sanctuary
symbols: towering stone figures — primordial or elemental forces invoked by the ritual
staff held by the figure — authority and mediation between human and supernatural realms
orange-golden light — supernatural energy or revelation
cave setting — descent into the underworld or the unconscious
dark robes of central figure — priestly or magical authority
description: A small figure in dark robes stands at the center of a vast cavern, holding a staff. Surrounding the figure are enormous stone or earth-formed entities that tower overhead, their forms resembling robed giants with elongated features. The cavern glows with warm orange and golden light, particularly from the background where fiery or luminous energy seems to emanate. Smaller figures or creatures cluster at the feet of the towering forms. The atmosphere is one of ancient, overwhelming power.
